details: The agent successfully navigated to the Wikipedia page and extracted complete data for the 3 most recent years (2025, 2024, 2023). The 2024 winners (John J. Hopfield and Geoffrey Hinton) and 2023 winners (Pierre Agostini, Ferenc Krausz, Anne L'Huillier) match the known facts exactly. The page also included 2025 data (John Clarke, Michel H. Devoret, John M. Martinis), which the agent correctly reported as the most recent year. All co-laureates for each year were listed, satisfying the completeness requirement.
